name: Wave
description_short: Wave Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union offering checking, savings, lending products, and financial planning services through partnerships.
description_long:
Wave Federal Credit Union is a federally-chartered credit union (routing # 211573407) that operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. The organization provides traditional banking and lending services to its membership base, emphasizing member benefits and community engagement through various initiatives.

Wave offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, student accounts, IRAs, and share certificates. On the lending side, they provide auto loans (as low as 4.49% APR), mortgages (as low as 5.96% APR), home equity loans and HELOCs (12-month intro rate at 4.99% APR), personal loans, recreational vehicle loans, student loans, and specialized products like pledge loans for credit building and skip-a-payment programs. They also issue a Platinum Visa credit card at 11.99% fixed APR with no annual fee. Additionally, Wave offers financial planning services through a partnership with Integrated Financial Partners, Inc., providing members access to fee-based financial advisory services.

Wave distinguishes itself through multiple surcharge-free ATM networks (SUM, MoneyPass, CO-OP, and RI Credit Union ATM Connection), membership benefits programs, and business checking accounts. The credit union has partnered with an independent financial planning firm to provide advanced financial coordination and advice. They also offer specialized loan programs like pledge loans designed to help members rebuild credit safely, and flexible skip-a-pay and cash reserve options for members facing temporary cash flow challenges.

As a credit union, Wave operates under NCUA insurance and member governance, which typically means lower fees and competitive rates compared to for-profit banks. However, the website content is limited to high-level marketing and does not provide detailed information about membership eligibility requirements, specific account fees, branch locations, or comprehensive product terms. Members should verify current rates and eligibility before applying.
services: Checking accounts with overdraft coverage options
Personal loans and debt consolidation loans
Financial planning services through Integrated Financial Partners partnership
Skip-a-payment and cash reserve loan programs
Direct deposit and wire transfer services
pros: Access to four surcharge-free ATM networks (SUM, MoneyPass, CO-OP, RI Credit Union ATM Connection) for broad cash access
Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 4.49% APR
No annual fee on Platinum Visa credit card at 11.99% fixed APR
Specialized pledge loan program designed specifically for credit building and repair
Free financial planning consultation available through partnership with Integrated Financial Partners, Inc.
Skip-a-pay and cash reserve options for temporary financial hardship
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure with NCUA insurance protection
Business checking accounts available for small business members
cons: Limited online visibility regarding membership eligibility requirements and enrollment process
Website does not clearly disclose account fees, minimum balances, or product-specific terms
Credit card APR of 11.99% is higher than many online credit card issuers
No information provided about branch locations or service hours on main pages
Financial planning services require scheduling appointments; no online advisory tools mentioned
best_for: Credit union members seeking comprehensive lending and banking in one institution
Borrowers rebuilding credit who qualify for pledge loans with credit-building structure
Vehicle purchasers looking for competitive auto loan rates without prepayment penalties
Individuals seeking free financial planning consultations with independent advisors
diagnosis: Wave Federal Credit Union is best for consumers already eligible for credit union membership who want an all-in-one financial institution with competitive lending rates, credit-building products, and integrated financial planning. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements are not clearly disclosed online, and prospective members should contact Wave directly to confirm they qualify before applying for services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Wave — NCUA-insured credit union in WARWICK, RI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
